Identity.title: My profile
Identity.signedOut: Sign in to manage your profile, posts, orders, verification, and Virtual Shares.
Identity.loading: Loading your profile, posts, and Virtual Shares.
Identity.unavailable: Your profile is unavailable right now.
Identity.identityTabDescription: This controls how other people see you: display details, verified identity, and public external accounts.

errors.verifyBeforeSkin: Complete {provider} verification before using @{handle} as your display skin.

profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell people what you are good at, what help you need, and how to work with you
profile.emptyExternalAccounts: No external accounts connected yet. Connect one so other people can confirm who you are.

verification.challengeCreated: Verification started on {date}. Follow the authorization page to finish.

assets.emptySystemReleased: You do not have usable system project Virtual Shares yet.
assets.emptyOtherReleased: No other project has released Virtual Shares to you yet.
assets.emptyLocked: No Virtual Shares are waiting for acceptance or approval right now.
assets.emptyFrozen: No Virtual Shares are frozen by a dispute right now.

market.emptyOffers: You have not posted an offer yet.
market.emptyOffersDescription: After you publish an offer, people can find it in the market and place orders.
market.emptyRequests: You have not posted a request yet.
market.emptyRequestsDescription: After you publish a request, the right person can take it and deliver the result.
market.emptyProjects: You have not created a project yet.
market.emptyProjectsDescription: Create a project to organize work with tasks, seats, and Virtual Shares.

activity.empty: You have not published any offers, requests, or projects yet.
activity.emptyDescription: Publish an offer, request, or project first so other people know what you can provide or what help you need.

orders.emptyMarketOrders: You do not have related orders yet.
orders.emptyMarketOrdersDescription: Orders appear here after you publish an offer, publish a request, or join something in the market.
orders.publishedDescription: Appears when someone buys your offer, answers your request, or joins your project
orders.emptyPublished: Your public posts have not generated orders yet.
orders.tradedDescription: Orders where you are the buyer, seller, fulfiller, accepter, or reviewer
orders.emptyTraded: You are not participating in any orders yet.

publicProfile.emptyBio: This user has not added a public bio yet.

publicPosts.title: Public posts
publicPosts.empty: This user has not published anything yet.
publicPosts.emptyDescription: You can browse the market to find other active offers, requests, and projects.

badges.earnedDescription: Earned through project collaboration and reputation.
badges.availableDescription: Open verification to activate this badge.
